current_plan: Assess the interview scope: identify the Java topics, level, and format you need to prepare for.
Review core Java fundamentals, including OOP, collections, exceptions, generics, multithreading, and JVM basics.
Practice common interview questions and coding problems in Java, focusing on problem-solving and clean code.
Build or revisit a few small Java projects or exercises to demonstrate practical understanding.
Do mock interviews and a final review of weak areas, important APIs, and common pitfalls.
